title: Penguh's Head-Craft
body:
# About
Head Craft is a peaceful alternative to the common "player head drops".  
No longer will you need to painfully shoot arrows up into the air and hope they land on your face to get your skull, just craft one instead!

## Crafting
To craft your head, put a carved pumpkin and a totem into a crafting grid like in the example below;  
![A crafting table gui with a totem of undying and a carved pumpkin in the input, and a player head in the output.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/h5W6JPuS/images/6ef5748b9036c8c08a4579d4766aad062aa567da.png)  
When you take the Steve head from the output, it will be replaced with your own head!

The recipe can be done anywhere in the crafting table, and can be done even inside the player's inventory.

## Compatibility
It should work perfectly fine in both singleplayer and multiplayer!
